description_long: This object is a rectangular loaf of bread with a gently domed top and a smooth, golden-brown crust. The surface is lightly dusted with flour, giving it a slightly speckled appearance, especially on the upper face. The sides and bottom are more matte and uniform in color, with subtle textural variations typical of baked bread. The loaf appears unsliced, with no visible cuts or openings, and the crust is unbroken and continuous around the entire object. The overall shape is symmetrical, with softly rounded edges and a broad, flat base. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the exterior.
description: A rectangular, golden-brown loaf of bread with a domed, flour-dusted top and smooth, unbroken crust.
description_view_0: The view shows the domed top and one of the rounded ends, highlighting the smooth, flour-dusted surface and the gentle curve of the crust.
description_view_1: This view presents the broad, flat side of the loaf, emphasizing the rectangular shape and the even, golden-brown coloration with a light dusting of flour on top.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle shows the opposite rounded end and the domed top, with the flour-dusted surface and smooth crust clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view displays the other broad side of the loaf, mirroring view 1, with a uniform golden-brown color and a lightly speckled, flour-dusted top.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is smooth and unscored, with a light dusting of flour creating a speckled pattern on the domed top. There are no seeds or decorative markings, and the surface is evenly colored with subtle natural variations.
